name: button-group-separator
visual_summary: A button-group-separator is a UI element used between groups of related buttons, improving visual hierarchy and clarity. It's often used in navigation menus or action buttons. This component works well when you need to separate buttons with similar functionalities.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready other component with the following characteristics:

Name: button-group-separator
Description: A button-group-separator is a UI element used between groups of related buttons, improving visual hierarchy and clarity. It's often used in navigation menus or action buttons. This component works well when you need to separate buttons with similar functionalities.
Style: default, dark, borderless
Interactions: static, nohover, nodbclick
Tags: navigation, buttons, divider

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
